role.description: The role of the message author.

content.description: The contents of the message. Can be a string or an array of content parts for multimodal inputs (text and images).

name.description: An optional name for the participant. Provides the model information to differentiate between participants of the same role.

tool_calls.description: The tool calls generated by the model, such as function calls.

tool_call_id.description: Tool call that this message is responding to. Required for tool role messages.
